title: The Partnership (The Cathedral)
description: A full partnership. I must align with your vision and product. I will not utilize my methods to build a 'Cathedral' on a weak foundation.

title: The Blueprint (Guided Alchemy)
description: I architect your entire alchemical system and sales 'Codex'. You and your team implement the 'Great Work' with my direct, ongoing coaching.

title: The Spark (Alchemical Analysis)
description: A comprehensive diagnostic of your business 'vessel' and strategy. We identify the core fractures and reveal the 'Prima Materia' (first matter) of your potential.
